V0904_01_00_00_0.text:
You believe you can defeat me in a Rush Duel?
Prove it!

V0904_01_00_01_0.text: I do not see any possibility of losing this Duel.

V0904_01_00_02_0.text: I will do anything to be victorious!

V0904_01_00_03_0.text: If you think you can stop me, you're welcome to try.

V0904_01_00_04_0.text: I am Zuwijo Zwil Velgear, leader of the Velgearian army.

V0904_01_00_05_0.text: If you have a problem with me, step forward!

V0904_01_00_06_0.text:
Listen, Yudias!
I will stop at nothing to end the war!

V0904_01_00_07_0.text:
Yudias!
I will remind you how much we've suffered!

V0904_01_00_08_0.text: Yudias, you will learn that my way is the right way!

V0904_01_00_09_0.text:
You are mere Terrestrials.
You cannot defeat me.

V0904_01_00_11_0.text: I will give you my honest opinion about your comic book.

V0904_03_00_01_0.text: There's nothing more you can do!

V0904_03_00_04_0.text: You should've defeated me when you had the chance!

V0904_03_00_05_0.text:
The battle isn't over!
You will not stop me!

V0904_05_00_00_0.text: I vowed to change the fate of my people!

V0904_07_09_00_0.text: I'll activate the card that I Set!

V0904_07_09_01_0.text: I haven't forgotten that I have this card!

V0904_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0904_11_12_00_0.text: I will Fusion Summon a monster!

V0904_16_00_00_0.text:
You're finished.
And there's nothing you can do about it!

V0904_21_00_00_0.text: Thinking you can win was your first mistake.

V0904_21_00_04_0.text: Even I have weaknesses that I need to work on...

V0904_21_00_05_0.text: I didn't expect you would fight so hard...

V0904_28_00_00_0.text: Be smarter next time and stay out of my way.

V0904_28_00_01_0.text: I will do anything for the glory of the Velgearians!

V0904_28_00_02_0.text: Though we have our differences, it was an honor to Duel you.

V0904_28_00_03_0.text:
I admire your spirit.
But spirit can only take you so far.

V0904_28_00_04_0.text: If you have nothing left to say, be gone!

V0904_28_00_05_0.text: You tried to adapt to my strategies, but it was not enough!

V0904_28_00_06_0.text:
Yudias!
How dare you call yourself a Velgearian warrior!

V0904_28_00_07_0.text: Yudias, you know nothing about what's going on.

V0904_28_00_07_1.text:
Zaberi doo gilrai velgeard!
I will change our destiny!

V0904_28_00_09_0.text: Your powers are too dangerous to leave unsupervised.

V0904_28_00_10_0.text: Your comic book barely qualifies as a form of entertainment!

V0904_28_00_11_0.text: You will never get this plate for your collection.

V0904_29_00_00_0.text: It seems us Velgearians cannot avoid our destiny...

V0904_29_00_01_0.text: Despite this setback, I will keep doing what I must!

V0904_29_00_03_0.text:
This battle is over...
Until we meet again.

V0904_29_00_04_0.text:
You haven’t changed.
Always dreaming of a better tomorrow.

V0904_29_00_04_1.text: But you need to learn that dreams aren’t reality!

V0904_29_00_05_0.text: Yudias, why are you unwilling to do what must be done?

V0904_29_00_06_0.text: Why can't you understand that the future demands sacrifice!

V0904_29_00_07_0.text: You're still the same Yudias today as you were long ago.

V0904_29_00_10_0.text:
*rumble rumble*
This Duel has left me low on energy.

V0904_33_00_00_0.text: Witness power you've never seen before!

V0904_33_00_01_0.text: You will learn how determined I am to win!

V0904_33_00_02_0.text: I'll do whatever I please - even if you don't like it!

V0904_30_00_02_0.text: If you have any complaints, I'm willing to listen.

V0904_34_00_00_0.text:
It's time to rise up and unite as one!
Beege bibaldoo!

V0904_34_00_01_0.text: You have never seen an ability like this! Egil Velgear!

V0904_34_00_02_0.text: Behold the even greater power I wield! Egil Velgear Gyuludo!

V0904_34_00_05_0.text: I am Zuwijo Zwil Velgear, proud owner of my own bagel shop.

V0904_34_00_06_0.text: While I draw, please enjoy one of my bagels.

V0904_34_00_07_0.text: I won't let you have my plates.

V0904_34_00_08_0.text: I find the taste of curry to be unappetizing.

V0904_34_00_09_0.text:
*rumble rumble*
That was just my stomach.  Ignore it.

V0904_34_00_11_0.text: That is exactly what I was expecting.

V0904_32_00_01_0.text: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links is the key to our ultimate victory!

V0904_36_00_02_0.text:
I've done all I can.
Finish this fight!

V0904_36_00_03_0.text: Victory is within your reach, Yudias.

V0904_36_00_05_0.text:
End this Duel, Yudias!
As only you can!

V0904_08_00_00_0.text:
Destroy any vision of hope!
I equip Voidvelg Gullinbursti!

V0904_08_00_01_0.text:
Protect against the raging flames!
I equip Voidvelg Shroud!

V0904_08_00_02_0.text: The magical blade that grants the wishes of the wicked!

V0904_08_00_03_0.text: I equip the Equip Spell, Voidvelg Phalanx on my monster!

V0904_08_00_04_0.text:
The twin maces of devastation!
I equip Voidvelg Morgenstein!

V0904_08_00_05_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Void Corridor!

V0904_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Fusionnnn!

V0904_08_00_07_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Dark Hole!

V0904_08_00_07_1.text: It destroys every monster on the field!

V0904_08_00_08_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Eclipse!

V0904_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Universal Storm!

V0904_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Attribute Shift Bomb!

V0904_08_00_11_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Void Intercept!

V0904_08_00_12_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Void Veil!

V0904_08_00_13_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Dark Nebula!

V0904_08_00_14_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Hardefense Mission!

V0904_08_00_15_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Emergency Return!

V0904_09_00_01_0.text: Requiem's effect draws strength from the dark!

V0904_09_00_02_0.text: I activate Voidvelg Divine Requiem's effect!

V0904_09_00_03_0.text: Voidvelg Divine Requiem activates its effect!

V0904_09_00_21_0.text: Burst Ray Blaster activates its effect!

V0904_37_00_00_0.text: The scourge that lives to decimate all that stand before it!

V0904_37_00_01_0.text:
The promise of a dark paradise!
Ascend before me!

V0904_37_00_02_0.text: The phantom wielding the sword of twilight!

V0904_37_00_03_0.text: The terror that lives only for conquest and glory!

V0904_37_00_04_0.text: Emerge from the abyss to combine into the end of days!

V0904_37_00_05_0.text: The void that will consume every last light in the universe!

V0904_37_00_06_0.text: The madness to thrust the stars into turmoil!

V0904_37_00_07_0.text: The rage that shatters the very fabric of order and balance!

V0904_19_00_01_0.text:
Voidvelg Requiem!
Play the final notes of their existence!

V0904_19_00_07_0.text:
Voidvelg Apocalypse!
Your attack will signal their end!

V0904_19_00_08_0.text: Hope rises across the land to shine upon the shadows!

V0904_19_00_12_0.text: Gigantomachia attacks for a second time!
